title: WTH is this trailer Fan made or leaked
display_title: WTH is this trailer Fan made or leaked
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] WTH is this trailer ? Fan made, or leaked ?             Quote Post by bladerj » Sat Jan 26, 2013 5:59 am There are some scenes way too well animated to be fan made, perhaps we were suposed to see what happened in the 14 years, or will see in the BD ? http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bYUe8Cj8bxQ

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Sat Jan 26, 2013 6:03 am They're just snippets from the Eva x JRA ad campaign: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/13234/Japanese-Racing-Association-campaign/

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Jan 26, 2013 6:06 am And the 2 trailers from before the 3.0's release, plus some bits from 2.0 and the preview at the end of 2.0. Doesn't contain any spoilers. Though the OP's post does, therefore the thread needs to be correctly labeled.
